title: SPARC Segmentation Conversion: Binary mask tracings to MBF XML
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"19tjn","text":"Convert binary mask tracings from Nikon's NIS Elements software into MBF XML format.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Open binary mask tracings (.tif) into program window.
Select the Outline Objects icon from the Trace ribbon.
Click on a black or white pixel on the binary mask tracings to automatically contour the representative object. Repeat until all objects are contoured.
Add subject metadata and select criteria for anatomic term list in the SPARC Vocabulary Services welcome dialog.
Choose the approrpiate vocabulary term from the contour selection toolbar.
creator: Maci Heal
